name: ger40_donchian_breakout_m15
hypothesis: On GER40 M15, a 40-bar Donchian breakout during the European cash session, gated by ADX and ATR-expansion, captures intraday trend legs driven by EU index momentum.

entry_rules.long: Close > Donchian(40).upper[1] AND EMA20 > EMA100 AND ATR(14) > SMA(ATR,50)*1.1
entry_rules.short: Close < Donchian(40).lower[1] AND EMA20 < EMA100 AND ATR(14) > SMA(ATR,50)*1.1

regime_filter.rationale: Breakouts only fire under confirmed trending + expanded-volatility regime; reject chop.
